# INSortType.asIs

**Case**

The sorted items are in the order returned.

## Declaration

```swift
case asIs
```

## Constants

- **INSortType.unknown**: The sort order is unknown.
- **INSortType.byDate**: The sorted items are in date order.

items.description: The sorted items are in date order.
